name: @nicholaswmin/reactive
description: Replicated reactive models with native ergonomics and efficient updates

scripts.test:mut: npx -y -p @stryker-mutator/core@9.6.1 -p @stryker-mutator/tap-runner@9.6.1 stryker run --testRunner tap --testFiles "test/**/*.test.js" --reporters clear-text,progress --cleanTempDir always
